Hero.title: Dilnoza's English
Hero.subtitle: Elevate your language skills with a modern, AI-powered approach to learning.

Capabilities.title: What We Offer
Capabilities.chatbotDesc: Practice conversations instantly. The AI responds like Dilnoza, providing corrections and guidance in English, Russian, or Uzbek.
Capabilities.articlesDesc: Generate high-quality English articles on any topic. Perfect for practicing reading comprehension and building vocabulary.

Philosophy.title: Dilnoza's Teaching Way
Philosophy.p1: Currently pursuing her PhD, Dilnoza has dedicated her academic and professional life to understanding the most effective methods for language acquisition.
Philosophy.p2: Her methodology centers around <bold>immersive dialogue</bold> and <bold>contextual understanding</bold>. Rather than memorizing endless grammar rules, she believes students excel when they engage in meaningful conversations and read materials that genuinely interest them.
Philosophy.p3: This platform embodies her philosophy: a safe, intelligent space for students to practice actively, make mistakes, and learn naturally through cutting-edge AI.

Footer.text: © {year} Dilnoza's English. Built for educational purposes.

Chatbot.welcomeSub: Start a conversation! Dilnoza is ready to chat with you in {language}.

Articles.title: English Articles
Articles.subtitle: Generate high-quality, English-only articles on any topic instantly to practice reading and vocabulary.
Articles.label: What do you want to read about?
